items.title: ZeroDrift raises $10 million to protect AI models from themselves
items.summary: A new AI compliance service sits between AI models and end users to flag and replace any messages that might present a compliance problem.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: Rocket engine startup Impulse raises $500 million to hire people, not AI
items.summary: Engineering physical systems still depends on human talent, according to Impulse Space president Eric Romo.

items.title: Alphabet plans to raise $80B to pay for AI buildout
items.summary: "The company is experiencing strong demand for its AI solutions and services from enterprises and consumers, at levels that are exceeding the company’s available supply," Alphabet said in its statement.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: AI costs how much? GitHub Copilot users react to new usage-based pricing system.
items.summary: Some report burning through their whole monthly "AI credit" allotment in a single day.

items.title: Hackers duped Meta AI support chatbot to steal celebrity Instagram accounts
items.summary: Pricey Instagram handles were stolen and resold before Meta patched the exploit.
